delta_summary: v0.3 dropped Pillar 3 Sephora and Storefronts, added release-notes log, consolidated marketplace tables. New v0.3 score is 3 points lower than v0.1 because the restructure left 5 stale internal references — the §01 Status block still names a Pillar 3 (Sephora) and Pillar 4 that no longer exist, the hero subhead still names Sephora as a connected system, and the home-page card still lists Sephora Engage as a pillar. All five fixes are mechanical.

findings.issue: Bullet still lists 'Pillar 3 · Fynd Engage for Sephora India' as Live — but §03 now declares only three pillars and §06 redefines Pillar 3 as 'Global Marketplace Reach'. The Status block contradicts the Pillar summary block on the same page.
findings.fix: Remove the 'Pillar 3 · Fynd Engage for Sephora India' bullet (Sephora Beauty Pass is still recorded as capability 10 inside Pillar 2's loyalty theme); renumber the marketplace bullet from 'Pillar 4' to 'Pillar 3'.

findings.issue: Home page card body says 'Pillars: JioMart 3P · RBL/RRVL ops · Sephora Engage · Global marketplaces' — Sephora Engage is no longer a standalone pillar. Also says '50+ marketplaces across 9+ countries' but page hero now says '50+ pre-built integrations · 25+ live · 12+ countries'.
findings.fix: Update home card to: 'Pillars: JioMart 3P · RBL/RRVL ops · Global marketplaces' + change '9+ countries' to '12+ countries'.

findings.issue: Subhead reads 'connecting JioMart, RBL and RRVL brand operations, Sephora India loyalty, and 50+ marketplaces' — listing four things, mapping to the old four pillars. With Pillar 3 removed, listing 'Sephora India loyalty' as a separate connected system overclaims (Sephora is one brand inside Pillar 2's portfolio, not a separate pillar).
findings.fix: Rewrite to three things matching the three pillars: 'connecting JioMart, RBL and RRVL brand operations, and 50+ marketplaces.' Sephora-as-brand still appears in the §05 brand portfolio table and capability 10.

findings.issue: Last bullet says 'Pillar 4 · Marketplace gateway · 50+ channels · 9+ countries' — Pillar 4 was renumbered to Pillar 3 and stats updated to 12+ countries / 25+ live marketplaces.
findings.fix: Renumber to 'Pillar 3 · Marketplace gateway · 50+ pre-built integrations · 25+ live · 12+ countries · India, Middle East, SEA, UK'.

findings.issue: Spec describes a 4-pillar / 8-section structure (§04 Pillar 1 → §07 Pillar 4 → §08 Sources) that no longer matches the v0.3 page (3 pillars, no Sources). The spec is now an out-of-date authoring artefact.
findings.fix: Update spec §3 Page Structure to reflect v0.3, OR add a 'v0.3 restructure' section noting the 4→3 pillar consolidation, release-notes format, and Sources removal. Acceptable for v0.3 — flag for next session.

strengths: Page slimmed from 753 lines to 385 lines (49% reduction) without losing source-cited content — release-notes log and consolidated marketplace table compress the dense source PDF into Apex-readable surface
Zero banned vocabulary on the page; zero banned constructions; no exclamation marks or emojis
Section labels run §01 → §06 contiguously after the restructure; no orphaned numbers, no gaps
Pillar 2 stat strip (13 · 20+ · 12 · 2) is sourced verbatim from the new Partnership Review PDF p.9 — a stat the v0.1 audit flagged as missing

Marketplace table now distinguishes Live (green pill) from In dev (amber 'In dev' pill) at a per-channel level — much higher honesty register than v0.2 which only had a separate 'Channels in development' subsection
All 4 page resources return 200/304; only console message is the standard Tailwind CDN dev warning
Quick Commerce row (Blinkit · Instamart · Zepto · Tata 1mg) placed inline in the India sub-table with a 'Live · QC' pill — efficient compression of source §6.3
